title: AFN PRAISES PRESIDENT BIDEN’S DECISION TO APPROVE THE WILLOW PROJECT
summary: ANCHORAGE, AK – The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) thanks President Biden for his Administration’s decision to approve ConocoPhillips’ Willow Project in Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve (NPRA). title: BREAKING: Biden administration approves Willow project, locking in massive greenhouse gases for decades
